name: Recent Errors (Last 1h)
query:
where Level in ("ERR", "CRT")
| where Timestamp > ago(1h)
| take 500
| sort by Timestamp desc

name: Warnings & Errors (Last 24h)
query:
where Level in ("ERR", "CRT", "WRN")
| where Timestamp > ago(24h)
| take 1000
| sort by Timestamp desc

name: All Logs (Last 15 min)
query:
where Timestamp > ago(15m)
| take 500
| sort by Timestamp desc

name: Startup Logs
query:
where Message contains "Starting"
| where Message !contains "heartbeat"
| take 200
| sort by Timestamp desc

name: Graph API Errors
query:
where Level in ("ERR", "CRT")
| where Message matches regex "graph|Graph|GRAPH"
| where Timestamp > ago(24h)
| take 500
| sort by Timestamp desc

name: Token / Auth Issues
query:
where Message matches regex "token|auth|unauthorized|forbidden|401|403"
| where Timestamp > ago(24h)
| take 500
| sort by Timestamp desc

name: Timeout Errors
query:
where Message matches regex "timeout|timed out|TaskCanceled"
| where Timestamp > ago(24h)
| take 500
| sort by Timestamp desc

name: All Errors (Search All Files)
query:
search all files
| where Level in ("ERR", "CRT")
| take 1000
| sort by Timestamp desc

name: Standards Processing
query:
where Message contains "Standard"
| where Timestamp > ago(24h)
| take 500
| sort by Timestamp desc

name: Full Log (Last 1h, no heartbeats)
query:
where Timestamp > ago(1h)
| where Message !contains "heartbeat"
| take 1000
| sort by Timestamp desc
